title: 45mm Rotary Cutter with 5pcs Extra Blades, Ergonomic Handle Rolling Cutter with Safety Lock for Fabric, Leather, Crafting, Sewing, Quilting, Fabric Rotary Cutter Perfect for Left & Right Hand(Purple)
features: ♡ Sharp and Durable: rotary blade is made from high quality of SKS7 stainless steel with is super sharp and long-lasting,which will help to save time.Perfect for cutting multiple layers of fabric, paper, felt and vinyl,and More! effortlessly without loose edges and threads. No strings are left behind, as it cuts clean and fast.

♡ Ergonomic 45mm Rotary Cutter: Ergonomically designed handle with soft-grip for comfort on both sides. Anti-Slide & to Reduce Joint Fatigue.The blades can also be installed on both sides of the rotary cutter, perfect for both right- and left-handed users.This rotary cutter is also compatible with pink, wavy blades.

♡ Designed with Safety Button: This handy rotary cutter is designed with a safety button to lock the blade.Once the safety locking button is set, the trigger handle cannot be used.Even a kid can use it safely under the supervision of his/her parents! Blade folds away nicely and safely, when trigger handle is released.

♡ What You Get: You can get 1pcs 45mm Rotary Cutter + 1pcs rotary blade, 5pcs extra replacement rotary cutter blades stored in a case, with these blades you could use for a long time.It's easy to use and replace blades.

♡ Save Your Time: This 45mm rotary cutter is suitable for cutting all kinds of fabrics, paper, leather, scrapbooking, quilting and for all types of arts & crafts. It is more reliable and convenient than a pair of scissors while saves you so much time, the Ideal tool for Quilting, Sewing, Scrapbooking, Card Making, and other DIY Projects!
